allow: Bash(node -e "const postcss=require\('postcss'\); const tailwindcss=require\('@tailwindcss/postcss'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); const input=fs.readFileSync\('public/frontend/assets/css/tailwind_css/tailwind_input.css','utf8'\); postcss\([tailwindcss]\).process\(input,{from:'public/frontend/assets/css/tailwind_css/tailwind_input.css',to:'public/frontend/assets/css/tailwind_css/tailwind_output.css'}\).then\(result=>{fs.writeFileSync\('public/frontend/assets/css/tailwind_css/tailwind_output.css',result.css\); console.log\('Done'\)}\);")
